weights: Technical direction and ownership of web application
Define and build shared design system and component foundation in React and TypeScript
Enable other product teams to build on shared foundation
Set conventions for state management and testing
Hands-on coding, technical review, and mentorship

decision.summary: Experienced Staff-level engineer with a proven track record of owning the technical direction of web applications, specializing in building and migrating modern frontend platforms using React and TypeScript. Led the replacement of legacy UI with a three-layer React/TypeScript architecture, including a component library and platform SDK, enabling feature teams to build upon it. Skilled in defining foundational architectures and fostering adoption across internal and external teams.

items.text: Led the replacement of a legacy jQuery frontend with a modern three-layer architecture utilizing React and TypeScript, establishing a new foundation for all feature work through a component library and platform SDK.
items.leadRationale: This directly addresses the primary requirement of replacing a legacy UI and building a modern React/TypeScript component foundation for other teams.

items.text: Built a platform SDK that exposed the platform programmatically, which was adopted by all internal project teams and became the standard integration path for new external clients.

cut.reason: While demonstrating platform thinking and developer experience improvements, this entry focuses on a backend rules engine and does not directly align with the job's strong emphasis on frontend architecture, UI modernization, and React/TypeScript expertise.
